message:
fix: avoid Next.js Script component minification bug causing appendChild SyntaxError

Replace Script component with useEffect-based GA initialization to avoid
a minification bug where the Script component's internal variables collide
during bundling, causing "Failed to execute 'appendChild' on 'Node': Invalid
or unexpected token" errors.

The bug occurs because Turbopack's minifier reuses variable names, causing
a function declaration to shadow a DOM element reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
